stemHtml: What does the term "aeronautical station" mean?

options.a: A station in the aeronautical mobile service located on land or, in certain instances, on board of a ship or on a platform at sea.
options.b: A station in the aeronautical telecommunication service located on land or on board of an aircraft to exchange radiotelephony communications.
options.c: Any station established to exchange radiotelephony communications.
options.d: An airborne station forming part of the aeronautical fixed telecommunication network (AFTN).
